raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Evoking a rhythmic ethical practice of ongoing self-examination and humble correction as a lived rhythm of integrity.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Continuous inward attention is possible and worthwhile",
    "Error is an expected part of human action",
    "Prompt acknowledgment restores balance"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as a compact, parallel construction linking observation with responsive action.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The listener values iterative self-correction and inhabits a context where honest inventory can be performed without external penalty.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If treated as a literal procedural checklist rather than an evocative ideal, or if used to mask avoidance of concrete restitution."
}
